name: Sensus Healthcare, Inc.
business: Sensus Healthcare is a medical device company that develops and sells superficial radiation therapy (SRT) systems for treating non-melanoma skin cancer and keloids. Its products include the SRT-100, SRT-100+, and SRT-100 Vision. The company sells primarily to dermatologists and radiation oncologists in the United States and internationally.
sellsTo: radiation oncologists in private and hospital settings
plastic surgery and laser aesthetic markets

exposures.sentence: Sensus Healthcare, Inc. ... is a medical device company committed to providing highly effective, non-invasive treatments for non-melanoma skin cancer (NMSC) and post-surgical keloid scar prevention.

In February 2026, the Company launched Sensus Link, a cloud-based software and connectivity solution intended to expand advanced operating capabilities across the Company’s SRT-100 system installed base.
Emerging technological trends such as artificial intelligence, machine learning, and automation are impacting many industries and business operations, including ours.
The Company has experienced, and expects to continue to experience, cyber security threats and incidents, none of which have been material to the Company to date.

catalysts.event: New CPT codes for SRT effective
catalysts.sentence: CMS released brand new CPT codes for SRT beginning on January 1, 2026

catalysts.event: Launch of Sensus Healthcare Financial Services
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the Company launched Sensus Healthcare Financial Services, a financing program through third party banks, to support the acquisition of the Company’s full line of systems

In February 2026, the Company launched Sensus Link, a cloud-based software and connectivity solution intended to expand advanced operating capabilities across the Company’s SRT-100 system installed base.
